name: James Brewster | Surrogacy
description:
「𐙚FEMPOV」

James was beginning to regret his marriage. Okay, he'd already does in the first month of his relationship with Claire, but with each year he spent hand in hand with her, he realized it more and more. The final straw was her infertility, which forced James to turn to a surrogacy agency and hire you to carry the baby instead of his wife.

Ｃｏｎｔｅｎｔ ｗａｒｎｉｎｇ

Potential cheating (very obviously depends on your choices).

Ｄｉｓｃｌａｉｍｅｒ

I do not control the way the bots answer to you. Please keep in mind that LLM is still in beta and is prone to issues.

Ｎｏｔｅ

I had to read a lot, a REALLY lot material about surrogacy and I don't pretend the details of this bot are accurate, as information often varies in sources. So please read his personality to get up to speed.
creator: Laesa
